title: Thailand Voxel Railway IR
description: Extension TH pack of Immersive Railroading
body:
# Description
This pack is made as Immersive Railroading extension that will add more Thai's and other trains!
In this pack u will find a rail vehicles especially Thai's trains, the wheels it will looks smaller than tracks cause the train are will quite bigger if in 16x16 bits = 1 block
but i will resolve this problem in the next project (mention to CDA5B1 and UM12C)

# content

**Locomotive**

-UM12C (General Electric)

-CDA5B1 (CRRC Qishuyan)

-ADD (alstom)

-AHK (alstom)

-ALS (alstom)

-APD.60 (Daewoo)

**Stock**

-N/A

**Passenger**

-N/A

**Necessary mods that must install before activate resource pack**

[Immersive Railroading](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-railroading)

[Track API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/track-api)

[Universal Mod Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-mod-core)

[Immersive Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering)


 
Many new things are coming in future, so don't forget to follow the pack on discord.

[Discord](https://discord.gg/PXuPtEtM2p) server
[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@prefend_) Channel

**HAVE FUN :)**
